prestazioni: Engine swap to a Toyota 1HD-FTE 4.2L turbo-diesel inline-six (from the Land Cruiser 80/100 series) with a custom bellhousing adapter plate (KSP Japan) and reinforced DE42 transmission (Daihatsu Delta-specific gearbox). Turbo upgrade to a Garrett GT2860RS with a custom 3-inch stainless downpipe (HKS) and 4-inch straight-pipe exhaust (Fujitsubo GSpec). Fuel system overhaul with 300cc injectors (Denso) and a Walbro 450LPH in-tank pump, controlled via a Link G4+ Xtreme ECU with custom Delta Truck CAN bus integration.

Suspension reinforcement with custom-fabricated 2.5-inch drop spindles (Delta Truck-specific, sourced from JDM specialist 'Delta Customs Osaka') and Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (modified for Delta Truck front/rear geometry). Polyurethane bushings (SuperPro) for the DE42 leaf spring mounts and reinforced sway bars (Whiteline, 24mm front, 22mm rear) to handle the 1HD-FTE torque. Braking system upgrade to Wilwood 6-piston calipers (front) and 4-piston (rear) with 330mm rotors (DBA 4000 series) and braided stainless lines (Goodridge).

Drivetrain reinforcement with a custom 2-piece aluminum driveshaft (Tommy Kaira) and a Quaife ATB differential (modified for the DE42 gearbox) with 4.88:1 gearing. Clutch upgrade to a twin-plate ceramic setup (Exedy Hyper Twin) with a reinforced flywheel (Spec Stage 4+) and a hydraulic throwout bearing (Tilton). Cooling system overhaul with a Mishimoto aluminum radiator (Delta Truck-specific fitment), dual 12-inch electric fans (SPAL), and a custom oil cooler (Setrab 625) mounted behind the front bumper.
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using Rocket Bunny Delta Truck-specific fender flares (Pandem, modified for the Delta's bolt-on bed design) with carbon fiber overfenders (Seibon). Front bumper replacement with a custom 3D-printed splitter (Delta Customs Osaka) and a vented hood (Rays Engineering, carbon fiber) to clear the 1HD-FTE intercooler. Rear bed delete with a custom aluminum flatbed (Delta Customs) featuring integrated roll bars (Sparco Pro2) and a carbon fiber tonneau cover (AeroCatch).

Wheel setup with Work Meister S1 3P 18x10 +15 (front) and 18x12 +25 (rear) in a custom bronze finish, wrapped in Toyo R888R 265/35/18 (front) and 295/30/18 (rear). Custom center caps with Delta Truck JDM badges (JDM Spec) and titanium wheel studs (ARP). Lowering via the Ohlins coilovers to achieve a 3-inch drop with aggressive camber settings (-3.5° front, -2.8° rear) for stance.

Aerodynamic package including a custom rear diffuser (Delta Customs, carbon fiber) with integrated LED brake lights (Philips X-tremeUltinon) and a roof-mounted GT wing (Voltex Type 3, 1700mm width, adjustable). Full vinyl wrap in 'Daihatsu Racing Blue' (3M 2080 series) with matte black accents (3M 1080) and custom JDM-style decals (Kansai Graphics, Delta Truck 'R-Spec' livery). Interior roll cage (Sparco Pro2, bolt-in) with Recaro Pole Position seats (cloth, JDM-spec) and a custom Momo Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm, suede).
